name: libayatana-indicator3-7
title: libayatana-indicator3-7
summary: panel indicator applet - shared library (GTK-3+ variant)
description:
panel indicator applet - shared library (GTK-3+ variant)
The Ayatana Indicators library contains information to build indicators
to go into modern desktops' indicator applets.
.
This package contains the library itself (GTK-3+ variant).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libayatana-indicator3-7 because panel indicator applet - shared library (GTK-3+ variant).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libayatana-indicator3-7 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libayatana-indicator3-7 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libayatana-indicator3-7 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
